---
title: "Early Late Corretness"
author: "Spike"
date: "2025-08-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Load Packages
``` {r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lme4)
library(broom.mixed)
```

## Load Data & Preprocess
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dat <- readxl::read_excel("data/correction_raw_data.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(ID = factor(ID))
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
items <- c(paste0("t1_q", 1:6), paste0("t2_q", 1:5), paste0("t3_q", 1:6))

truth <- c(rep(FALSE, 6), rep(FALSE, 5), FALSE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, TRUE)
names(truth) <- items

s1 <- paste0("stage1_", items)
s2 <- paste0("stage2_", items)
s3 <- paste0("stage3_", items)
fu <- paste0("follow_up_", items)

# Filter Participants With Follow-up Responses
dat <- dat %>%
  filter(rowSums(across(all_of(fu), ~ !is.na(.))) > 0)

# Coerce Answer Types
dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(fu), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), NA, . == 1)),
    across(all_of(c(s1, s2, s3)), as.logical)
  )

# Long Format, Attach Truth, Compute Correctness
long <- dat %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^(stage1|stage2|stage3|follow_up)_t[123]_q\\d+$"),
    names_to = c("Stage", "Item"),
    names_pattern = "^(stage1|stage2|stage3|follow_up)_(t\\d_q\\d+)$",
    values_to = "Ans"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Item = factor(Item, levels = items),
    Task = factor(sub("_q\\d+$", "", as.character(Item)), levels = c("t1", "t2", "t3"))
  )

truth_df <- tibble(Item = factor(items, levels = items), Truth = truth)

wide <- long %>%
  left_join(truth_df, by = "Item") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Stage, values_from = Ans) %>%
  mutate(
    S1c = stage1 == Truth,
    S2c = stage2 == Truth,
    S3c = stage3 == Truth,
    FUc = if_else(is.na(follow_up), NA, follow_up == Truth)
  )

# Build Analysis Dataset: Early vs Late Correction
analysis <- wide %>%
  filter(S1c == FALSE, (S2c | S3c), !is.na(FUc)) %>%
  mutate(
    EarlyCorrected = as.integer(S2c == TRUE),
    Item = factor(Item),
    ID = factor(ID)
  )
```

## Descriptives and Main Model
### Follow-up Accuracy by Early/Late
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
desc <- analysis %>%
  group_by(Label, EarlyCorrected) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_FU_correct = mean(FUc),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = ifelse(
      EarlyCorrected == 1,
      "Early-corrected (by S2)",
      "Late-corrected (only by S3)"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Label, Group, n, mean_FU_correct)

print(desc)
```

### Logistic Mixed Model
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
analysis$EarlyCorrected <- factor(analysis$EarlyCorrected, levels = c("1", "0"))

fit <- glmer(
FUc ~ EarlyCorrected * Label + Task + overall_accuracy_stage1 + (1 | ID) + (1 | Item),
data = analysis,
family = binomial
)

summary(fit)
```

### Odds Ratios (Fixed Effects)
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
or_tab <- broom.mixed::tidy(
fit,
effects = "fixed",
conf.int = TRUE,
exponentiate = TRUE
)

print(or_tab)
```

### Inference and Post-hoc
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
aov <- car::Anova(fit, type = 3)
aov

parameters::model_parameters(fit, exponentiate = TRUE)

emmeans(fit, pairwise ~ EarlyCorrected)
```

``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
emmeans(fit, pairwise ~ Label * EarlyCorrected)
```

### Model Comparison
#### Fit Interaction With Task
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
fit2 <- glmer(
FUc ~ EarlyCorrected * Task * Label + (1 | ID) + (1 | Item),
data = analysis,
family = binomial
)
```

#### Compare Models
``` {r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
anova(fit, fit2)

performance::compare_performance(fit, fit2, rank = TRUE)
```
